title: Survivors Throne/Season 2
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: Upthrust Esports Survivors Throne S2}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=5 |name=Survivors Throne S2 |tickername=Survivors Throne S2 |image=Survivor_throneS2.jpg |imagedark= |type=Online |team_number=18 |icon= |series=Survivors Throne |organizer=Upthrust Esports |organizer-link=http://instagram.com/upthrust_esports/ |sponsor=[https://loco.gg/ LOCO] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=1,50,000 |country=India |sdate=2022-02-17 |edate=2022-02-21 |twitter= |instagram=upthrust_esports |web= |facebook= |youtube=c/UPTHRUSTESPORTS |previous=Survivors_Throne{{!}}S1 |next= }} '''[http://instagram.com/upthrust_esports/ Upthrust Esports]''' present a BGMI invitational tournament called the '''Survivors Throne S2''' with a prize pool of ₹150,000 INR ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=RA1|b1flag=in |b1name=Vipul Kumar |b2=Captain Price|b2flag=in |b2name=Dhrubajyoti Das |b3=NekRoz|b3flag=in|b3name=Sneherdra Srimany }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Survivors Throne:''' 17th February 2022 to 21st February 2022.'' Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]] and [[Miramar]] * A total of 18 Invited teams will compete in the tournament. * Teams will get to play a total of 23 matches in a period of 5 days. * 5 matches to be played each day on 17,18,19 and 20th. * 3 matches to be played on 21st. ====Points Distribution==== {{{title|For {{abbr|"Points Matrix"|Points Matrix}} '''Click here'''.}}}
